Description.TranslatedText: Set 'Y' if subject with DS.DSDECOD countians 'ADVERSE EVENT' or 'AE' and the specified adverse event number match the AE.AESPID where DSCAT = DISPOSITION EVENT and DS.DSSCAT='END OF STUDY' Otherwise null
HO.HOENDTC where HOTERM='HOSPITAL' based on AESPID and HOSPID
HO.HOSTDTC where HOTERM='HOSPITAL' based on AESPID and HOSPID
Set to numeric date part of AEENDTC
Concatenate AENDT and AENTM if both are non-missing
Set to numeric time part of AEENDTC
Concatenate ATOXGR and Mixed case of AESEV with '/', eg, Grade 1/Mild; Set to ATOXGR if ATOXGR is 'Grade 4'

‘Vaccination stage’ If .< ADSL.TR01SDTM <=ASTDTM and ASTDT<= ADSL.TR01EDT+27, if time part of TR01SDTM or time part of ASTDTM is missing, use TR01SDT and ASTDT. ‘Follow up stage’ if ASTDT> ADSL.TR01EDT+27
Concatenate ASTDT and ASTTM if both are non-missing
ASTDT – ADSL.TR01SDT + 1 if ASTDT >= TR01SDT, else ASTDT – ADSL.TR01SDT if ASTDT< TR01SDT.
Time part of AESTDTC and ASTDT for imputation. If ASTDT is imputed and is set to the first vaccination day while time part of AESTDTC not missing, reset ASTTM to the time of first vaccination.
H if time is imputed based on ASTTM derivation; Otherwise null.
Set to 'Y' if non-missing MRDSTDY<=28; Blank otherwise.
HO.HOOCCUR where HOTERM='ADMITTED TO ICU' based on AESPID and HOSPID
HO.HODUR where HOTERM='ADMITTED TO ICU' based on AESPID and HOSPID
Set to 'Vaccination 1' if AE.AEREFID contains 'DOSE 1'； Set to 'Vaccination 2' if AE.AEREFID contains 'DOSE 2'

Set to (the largest integer less than or equal to (AENDTM – ADSL.TR01SDTM)/(24*60*60)) + 1 If MDOSREF='Vaccination 1', set to (the largest integer less than or equal to (AENDTM – ADSL.DOS2DTM)/(24*60*60)) + 1 If MDOSREF='Vaccination 2'. if time part of AENDTM is missing, use AENDT to replace AEENDTM and calculate as follows: AENDT – ADSL.TR01SDT+ 1 If MDOSREF='Vaccination 1', AENDT – ADSL.DOSE2DT+ 1 If MDOSREF='Vaccination 2'. (For example, ADSL.TR01SDTM is on 01Mar2020 at 2 pm, the AENDTM is on 02Mar2020 at 8 am, the MRDENDY will be Day 1 with MDOSREF='Vaccination 1'. ADSL.TR01SDTM is on 01Mar2020 at 2 pm, the AENDTM is on 02Mar2020 at 5 pm, the MRDENDY will be Day 2 with MDOSREF='Vaccination 1'. )

Set to (the largest integer less than or equal to (ASTDTM – ADSL.TR01SDTM)/(24*60*60)) + 1 If MDOSREF='Vaccination 1', set to (the largest integer less than or equal to (ASTDTM – ADSL.DOS2DTM)/(24*60*60)) + 1 If MDOSREF='Vaccination 2'. if time part of ASTDTM is missing, use ASTDT to replace ASTDTM and calculate as follows: ASTDT – ADSL.TR01SDT+ 1 If MDOSREF='Vaccination 1', ASTDT – ADSL.DOSE2DT+ 1 If MDOSREF='Vaccination 2'. (For example, ADSL.TR01SDTM is on 01Mar2020 at 2 pm, the ASTDTM is on 02Mar2020 at 8 am, the MRDSTDY will be Day 1 with MDOSREF='Vaccination 1'. ADSL.TR01SDTM is on 01Mar2020 at 2 pm, the ASTDTM is on 02Mar2020 at 5 pm, the MRDSTDY will be Day 2 with MDOSREF='Vaccination 1'. )
"Y" if .< ADSL.TR01SDTM <= ASTDTM, or (if ASTDT missing and .< ADSL.TR01SDTM <= AENDTM) or both ASTDT and AENDT missing. If time is not available, use TR01SDT, ASTDT and AENDT.

Only for subjects with RANDFL='Y' and PPBD29FL='N': Set to PP_list.PBABREAS where VISITTPT='Day 29'. if subejct has dosing error (ADSL.PPBABERS contains 'Dosing error') then set to 'Dosing error' and concatenate with the reason from PP_list if applicable
Set to numeric date part of FACE.FADTC if source data are from FACE Set to number date part of VS.VSDTC if source data are from VS
Set to numeric date time of FACE.FADTC if time part is not missing for data is from FACE Set to numeric date time of VS.VSDTC if time part is not missing for data is from VS
Set to FACE.FADY if source data are from FACE Set to VS.VSDY if source data are from VS

If PARAMCD is RASHOCC or LYMPHOCC: Set to 'Y' by selecting the first record with maximum non-missing AVALC (Y>N) per subject per PARAM per vaccination (ATPTREF) per ATPTGR1, i.e., the first available record per day If PARAMCD not in (RASHOCC or LYMPHOCC): Set to 'Y' for the first record with maximum non-missing ATOXGRN per subject per PARAM per vaccination (ATPTREF) per ATPTGR1, i.e., the first available record per day If there is two records per day and one from investigator and one from subject, select the one from subject (FAEVAL='STUDY SUBJECT')

Y for the first record with maximum non-missing AVALC (Y>N) per subject per PARAM per vaccination (ATPTREF) per ATPT, i.e., the first available record per day. If there is two records per day and one from investigor and one from subject, select the one from subject (FAEVAL='STUDY SUBJECT') If PARAMCD not in (RASHOCC or LYMPHOCC): Y for the first record with maximum non-missing ATOXGRN per subject per PARAM per vaccination (ATPTREF) per ATPT, i.e., the first available record per day. If there is two records per day and one from investigor and one from subject, select the one from subject (FAEVAL='STUDY SUBJECT' or missing FAEVAL for FEVER)
Set to numeric time part of FACE.FADTC If source data are from FACE Set to numeric time part of VS.VSDTC if source data are from VS

If source data are from FACE and FAEVAL='STUDY SUBJECT', set to FACE.CRFTMPT, If source data are from FACE and FAEVAL=''INVESTIGATOR', set to FACE.FATPT, If source data are from VS, set to VS.VSTPT; Recode 'DAY 1' as 'DAY 1, AFTER VACCINATION (AT HOME)' if FAEVAL='INVESTIGATOR' and PARAMCD is not RASH and LYMPHOCC
Set to 'Day 1' if ATPT contains 'Day 1' Set to ATPT otherwise

If source data are from FACE: Set to 'Vaccination 1' if FACE.FATPTREF contains 'DOSE 1' Set to 'Vaccination 2' if FACE.FATPTREF contains 'DOSE 2' If source data are from VS: Set to 'Vaccination 1' if VS.VSTPTREF contains 'DOSE 1' Set to 'Vaccination 2' if VS.VSTPTREF contains 'DOSE 2'
Set to FACE.FASTRESN if source data are from FACE Set to VS.VSSTRESN if source data are from VS
Set to 0 If source data are from FACE and FAOBJ = 'Erythema' or 'Swelling' and FATEST='OCCURRENCE' and FAORRES='N' Set to FACE.FASTRESN, otherwise
Set to FACE.FASTRESC if source data are from FACE Set to VS.VSSTRESC if source data are from VS
Set to FACE.FASTRESC if source data are from FACE Set to VS.VSSTRESC if source data are from VS
Set to '> 102.6 degrees F' if CRIT1FL='Y'
Set to '> 103.1 degrees F' if CRIT2FL='Y'
Set to '> 103.6 degrees F' if CRIT3FL='Y'
Set to '> 104.1 degrees F' if CRIT4FL='Y'

Set to 'Grade 0' if .<AVAL < 25 mm or FASTRESC contains 'GRADE 0' Set to 'Grade 1' if AVAL = 25 - 50 mm or FASTRESC contains 'GRADE 1', Set to 'Grade 2' if AVAL = 51 - 100 mm or FASTRESC contains 'GRADE 2', Set to 'Grade 3' if AVAL > 100 mm or FASTRESC contains 'GRADE 3', Set to 'Grade 4' if FASTRESC contains 'GRADE 4',

Set to 'Grade 0' if .<AVAL < 38.0°C or FASTRESC contains 'GRADE 0' Set to 'Grade 1' if AVAL = 38.0 – 38.4°C or FASTRESC contains 'GRADE 1' Set to 'Grade 2' if AVAL = 38.5 – 38.9°C or FASTRESC contains 'GRADE 2' Set to 'Grade 3' if AVAL = 39.0 – 40.0°C or FASTRESC contains 'GRADE 3' Set to 'Grade 4' if AVAL > 40.0°C or FASTRESC contains 'GRADE 4'

Set to 'Grade 0' if FASTRESC='NONE' or FASTRESC contains 'GRADE 0' Set to 'Grade 1' if FASTRESC='NO INTERFERENCE WITH ACTIVITY' or FASTRESC contains 'GRADE 1' Set to 'Grade 2' if FASTRESC='REPEATED USE OF OVER-THE-COUNTER PAIN RELIEVER > 24 HOURS OR SOME INTERFERENCE WITH ACTIVITY' or FASTRESC contains 'GRADE 2' Set to 'Grade 3' if FASTRESC='ANY USE OF PRESCRIPTION PAIN RELIEVER OR PREVENTS DAILY ACTIVITY' or FASTRESC contains 'GRADE 3' Set to 'Grade 4' if FASTRESC contains 'GRADE 4'

Set to 'Grade 0' if FASTRESC='NONE' or FASTRESC contains 'GRADE 0' Set to 'Grade 1' if FASTRESC='DOES NOT INTERFERE WITH ACTIVITY' or FASTRESC contains 'GRADE 1' Set to 'Grade 2' if FASTRESC='REPEATED USE OF OVER-THE-COUNTER PAIN RELIEVER > 24 HOURS OR INTERFERES WITH SOME ACTIVITY' or FASTRESC contains 'GRADE 2' Set to 'Grade 3' if FASTRESC='ANY USE OF PRESCRIPTION PAIN RELIEVER OR PREVENTS DAILY ACTIVITY' or FASTRESC contains 'GRADE 3' Set to 'Grade 4' if FASTRESC contains 'GRADE 4'

Set to 'Grade 0' if FASTRESC=NONE' or FASTRESC contains 'GRADE 0' Set to 'Grade 1' if FASTRESC='NO INTERFERENCE WITH ACTIVITY' or FASTRESC contains 'GRADE 1' Set to 'Grade 2' if FASTRESC='SOME INTERFERENCE WITH ACTIVITY' or FASTRESC contains 'GRADE 2' Set to 'Grade 3' if FASTRESC='SIGNIFICANT; PREVENTS DAILY ACTIVITY' or FASTRESC contains 'GRADE 3' Set to 'Grade 4' if FASTRESC contains 'GRADE 4'

Set to 'Grade 0' if FASTRESC='NONE' or FASTRESC contains 'GRADE 0' Set to 'Grade 1' if FASTRESC= ‘NO INTERFERENCE WITH ACTIVITY OR 1-2 EPISODES/24 HOURS' or FASTRESC contains 'GRADE 1' Set to 'Grade 2' if FASTRESC='SOME INTERFERENCE WITH ACTIVITY OR >2 EPISODES/24 HOURS' or FASTRESC contains 'GRADE 2' Set to 'Grade 3' if FASTRESC='PREVENTS DAILY ACTIVITY, REQUIRES OUTPATIENT IV HYDRATION' or FASTRESC contains 'GRADE 3' Set to 'Grade 4' if FASTRESC contains 'GRADE 4'
numeric part of ARRDENPT - numeric part of ARRDSTPT + 1

Per subject per vaccination (ATPTREF): Set to numeric date part of last FAAE.FADTC where FAOBJ='Erythema' and FATEST='Longest Diameter' and FASTRESN>=25 mm Set to numeric date part of last FAAE.FADTC where FAOBJ='Swelling' and FATEST='Longest Diameter' and FASTRESN>=25 mm Set to numeric date part of last VS.VSDTC where VSTESTCD='TEMP' and VSSTRESN>=38.0 C Set to numeric date part of last FAAE.FADTC where FAOBJ='Pain' and FASTRESC is not 'NONE' or missing Set to numeric date part of last FAAE.FADTC where FAOBJ='Underarm Gland Swelling or Tenderness' and FASTRESC is not 'NONE' or missing Set to numeric date part of last FAAE.FADTC where FAOBJ='Headache' and FASTRESC is not 'NONE' or missing Set to numeric date part of last FAAE.FADTC where FAOBJ='Fatigue' and FASTRESC is not 'NONE' or missing Set to numeric date part of last FAAE.FADTC where FAOBJ='Myalgia' and FASTRESC is not 'NONE' or missing Set to numeric date part of last FAAE.FADTC where FAOBJ='Arthralgia' and FASTRESC is not 'NONE' or missing Set to numeric date part of last FAAE.FADTC where FAOBJ='Nausea/Vomiting' and FASTRESC is not 'NONE' or missing Set to numeric date part of last FAAE.FADTC where FAOBJ='Chills' and FASTRESC is not 'NONE' or missing Set to numeric date part of last FAAE.FADTC where FAOBJ='Rash' and FASTRESC is 'Y'
Concatenate AENDT and AENTM if both are non-missing
Corresponding time part based on the derivation of AENDT

Y for the first record with maximum non-missing ATOXGRN per subject per PARAM per vaccination (ATPTREF). If there is two records per day and one from investigor and one from subject, select the one from subject (FAEVAL='STUDY SUBJECT' or missing FAEVAL for FEVER)
If PARAMCD =RASHOCC: Y for the first record with maximum non-missing AVALC (Y>N) per subject per PARAM per vaccination (ATPTREF). If there is two records per day and one from investigor and one from subject, select the one from subject (FAEVAL='STUDY SUBJECT')
Set to FAAE.FATPT/VS.VSTPT based on the corresponding AENDT
Set to FAAE.FATPT/VS.VSTPT based on the corresponding ASTDT

"Per subject per vaccination (ATPTREF) per FAEVAL, set to the highest order of FAAE.FASTRESC where FAOBJ='Arthralgia' and FASTRESC is not 'NONE' or missing
'NO INTERFERENCE WITH ACTIVITY' or contains 'GRADE 1' < ‘SOME INTERFERENCE WITH ACTIVITY’ or contains 'GRADE 2' <‘SIGNIFICANT; PREVENTS DAILY ACTIVITY’ or contains 'GRADE 3'"

Per subject per vaccination (ATPTREF): Set to numeric date part of first FAAE.FADTC where FAOBJ='Erythema' and FATEST='Longest Diameter' and FASTRESN>=25 mm Set to numeric date part of first FAAE.FADTC where FAOBJ='Swelling' and FATEST='Longest Diameter' and FASTRESN>=25 mm Set to numeric date part of first VS.VSDTC where VSTESTCD='TEMP' and VSSTRESN>=38.0°C Set to numeric date part of first FAAE.FADTC where FAOBJ='Pain' and FASTRESC is not 'NONE' or missing Set to numeric date part of first FAAE.FADTC where FAOBJ='Underarm Gland Swelling or Tenderness' and FASTRESC is not 'NONE' or missing Set to numeric date part of first FAAE.FADTC where FAOBJ='Headache' and FASTRESC is not 'NONE' or missing Set to numeric date part of first FAAE.FADTC where FAOBJ='Fatigue' and FASTRESC is not 'NONE' or missing Set to numeric date part of first FAAE.FADTC where FAOBJ='Myalgia' and FASTRESC is not 'NONE' or missing Set to numeric date part of first FAAE.FADTC where FAOBJ='Arthralgia' and FASTRESC is not 'NONE' or missing Set to numeric date part of first FAAE.FADTC where FAOBJ='Nausea/Vomiting' and FASTRESC is not 'NONE' or missing Set to numeric date part of first FAAE.FADTC where FAOBJ='Chills' and FASTRESC is not 'NONE' or missing Set to numeric date part of first FAAE.FADTC where FAOBJ='Rash' and FASTRESC is 'Y'
Concatenate ASTDT and ASTTM if both are non-missing
Corresponding time part based on the derivation of ASTDT

Grade 1 if AVAL = 25 - 50 mm or AVALC contains 'GRADE 1', Grade 2 if AVAL = 51 - 100 mm or AVALC contains 'GRADE 2', Grade 3 if AVAL > 100 mm or AVALC contains 'GRADE 3'; Grade 4 if AVALC contains 'GRADE 4'

Grade 1 if AVAL = 25 - 50 mm or AVALC contains 'GRADE 1', Grade 2 if AVAL = 51 - 100 mm or AVALC contains 'GRADE 2', Grade 3 if AVAL > 100 mm or AVALC contains 'GRADE 3'; Grade 4 if AVALC contains 'GRADE 4'

Grade 1 if AVAL = 38.0 – 38.4°C or AVALC contains 'GRADE 1', Grade 2 if AVAL = >38.4 – 38.9°C or AVALC contains 'GRADE 2', Grade 3 if AVAL = 39.0 – 40.0°C or AVALC contains 'GRADE 3', Grade 4 if AVAL > 40.0°C or AVALC contains 'GRADE 4',

If source data are from FAAE: Set to 'Vaccination 1' if FAAE.FATPTREF contains 'DOSE 1' Set to 'Vaccination 2' if FAAE.FATPTREF contains 'DOSE 2' If source data are from VS: Set to 'Vaccination 1' if VS.VSTPTREF contains 'DOSE 1' Set to 'Vaccination 2' if VS.VSTPTREF contains 'DOSE 2'

Per subject per vaccination (ATPTREF) per FAEVAL, set to the highest order of FAAE.FASTRESC where FAOBJ='Chills' and FASTRESC is not 'NONE' or missing
‘NO INTERFERENCE WITH ACTIVITY’ or contains 'GRADE 1'< ‘SOME INTERFERENCE WITH ACTIVITY NOT REQUIRING MEDICAL ATTENTION’ or contains 'GRADE 2' < ‘PREVENTS DAILY ACTIVITY AND REQUIRES MEDICAL ATTENTION’ or contains 'GRADE 3'

Per subject per vaccination (ATPTREF) per FAEVAL, set to the corresponding FAAE.FASTRESC for the largest FASTRESN>=25 mm where FAOBJ='Erythema' and FATEST='Longest Diameter' or set to the highest order of FAAE.FASTRESC where FAOBJ='Erythema' and FATEST contains 'Intensity' (GRADE 1<GRADE 2<GRADE 3< GRADE 4) note: if there are records from both Longest diameter and intensity, choose the one with highest garde. if both fall in the same grade, use FASTRESC from FATEST='Longest Diameter'. 25-50 mm is corresponding to Grade 1, 51-100 mm is corresponding to Grade 2, and >100 mm is corresponding to Grade 3.

"Per subject per vaccination (ATPTREF) per FAEVAL, set to the highest order of FAAE.FASTRESC where FAOBJ='Fatigue' and FASTRESC is not 'NONE' or missing
'NO INTERFERENCE WITH ACTIVITY' or contains 'GRADE 1'< ‘SOME INTERFERENCE WITH ACTIVITY’ or contains 'GRADE 2' <‘SIGNIFICANT; PREVENTS DAILY ACTIVITY’ or contains 'GRADE 3'"

Per subject per vaccination (ATPTREF) per FAEVAL, set to the corresponding VS.VSSTRESC for the largest VS.VSSTRESN>=38 C where VSTESTCD='TEMP' or set to the highest order of FAAE.FASTRESC where FAOBJ='Fever' (GRADE 1<GRADE 2<GRADE 3<GRADE 4) note: if there are records from both LVS and FAAE, choose the one with highest garde. if both fall in the same grade, use FAAE.FASTRESC. 38-38.4 C is corresponding to Grade 1, >38.4-38.9 C is corresponding to Grade 2, 39-40 C is corresponding to Grade 3, and >40 C is corresponding to Grade 4.

Per subject per vaccination (ATPTREF) per FAEVAL, set to the highest order of FAAE.FASTRESC where FAOBJ='Headache' and FASTRESC is not 'NONE' or missing
’NO INTERFERENCE WITH ACTIVITY’ or contains 'GRADE 1'< ‘REPEATED USE OF OVER-THE-COUNTER PAIN RELIEVER > 24 HOURS OR SOME INTERFERERENCE WITH ACTIVITY’ or contains 'GRADE 2'< ‘ANY USE OF PRESCRIPTION PAIN RELIEVER OR PREVENTS DAILY ACTIVITY’ or contains 'GRADE 3'

Per subject per vaccination (ATPTREF) per FAEVAL, set to the highest order of FAAE.FASTRESC where FAOBJ='Underarm Gland Swelling or Tenderness' and FASTRESC is not 'NONE' or missing
’DOES NOT INTERFERE WITH ACTIVITY’ or contains 'GRADE 1' < ‘REPEATED USE OF OVER-THE-COUNTER PAIN RELIEVER > 24 HOURS OR INTERFERES WITH SOME ACTIVITY’ or contains 'GRADE 2' < ‘ANY USE OF PRESCRIPTION PAIN RELIEVER OR PREVENTS DAILY ACTIVITY’ or contains 'GRADE 3'
For each PARAM, ATPTREF, FAEVAL, set to Y if there is one record in SUPPFAAE.QVAL where SUPPFAAE.QNAME='MAAEFL'

Per subject per vaccination (ATPTREF) per FAEVAL, set to the highest order of FAAE.FASTRESC where FAOBJ='Myalgia' and FASTRESC is not 'NONE' or missing
'NO INTERFERENCE WITH ACTIVITY' or contains 'GRADE 1'< ‘SOME INTERFERENCE WITH ACTIVITY’ or contains 'GRADE 2' <‘SIGNIFICANT; PREVENTS DAILY ACTIVITY’ or contains 'GRADE 3'

Per subject per vaccination (ATPTREF) per FAEVAL, set to the highest order of FAAE.FASTRESC where FAOBJ='Nausea/Vomiting' and FASTRESC is not 'NONE' or missing
‘NO INTERFERENCE WITH ACTIVITY OR 1-2 EPISODES/24 HOURS’ or contains 'GRADE 1'< ‘SOME INTERFERENCE WITH ACTIVITY OR >2 EPISODES/24 HOURS’ or contains 'GRADE 2'< ‘PREVENTS DAILY ACTIVITY, REQUIRES OUTPATIENT IV HYDRATION’ or contains 'GRADE 3'

Per subject per vaccination (ATPTREF) per FAEVAL, set to the highest order of FAAE.FASTRESC where FAOBJ='Pain' and FASTRESC is not 'NONE' or missing
’DOES NOT INTERFERE WITH ACTIVITY’ or contains 'GRADE 1'< ‘REPEATED USE OF OVER-THE-COUNTER PAIN RELIEVER > 24 HOURS OR INTERFERES WITH ACTIVITY’ or contains 'GRADE 2'< ‘ANY USE OF PRESCRIPTION PAIN RELIEVER OR PREVENTS DAILY ACTIVITY’ or contains 'GRADE 3'

Set to 'Rash'||' '||FATEST if source data are from FAAE and FAOBJ='Rash', and FATESTCD ne 'SEV' Set to 'Lymphadenopathy' if source data are from FAAE and FAOBJ='Underarm Gland Swelling or Tenderness' and FATESTCD = 'SEV' Set to 'Nausea/Vomiting' if source data are from FAAE and FAOBJ='Nausea' and FATESTCD = 'SEV' Set to FAOBJ||' Longest Diameter (mm)' iff source data are from FAAE and FAOBJ in ('Erythema' 'Swelling') and FATEST='OCCURRENCE' and FAORRES='N' Set to 'FAOBJ'||' '||FATEST||' '||'('||FAORRESU||')' if source data are from FAAE and FAOBJ in ('Erythema' 'Swelling') and FATEST='Longest Diameter' Set to FAOBJ otherwise. Set to 'Fever'||'('||VSSTRESU||')' if source data are from VS and VSTESTCD in ('TEMP' 'VSALL') Note: 1. Please add space between the VSTEST and VS unit. If the VSSTRESU is missing, use non-missing VSSTRESU 2. For each PARAM, keep only one record per subject per vaccination (ATPTREF)

If source data are from FACE: Set to 'LOCAL' if FASCAT=ADMINISTRATION SITE Set to FASCAT if FASCAT<>ADMINISTRATION SITE
Set to VSSCAT if source data are from VS

Per subject per vaccination (ATPTREF) per FAEVAL, set to the corresponding FAAE.FASTRESC for the largest FASTRESN>=25 mm where FAOBJ='Swelling' and FATEST='Longest Diameter' or set to the highest order of FAAE.FASTRESC where FAOBJ='Swelling' and FATEST contains 'Intensity' (GRADE 1<GRADE 2<GRADE 3<GRADE 4) note: if there are records from both Longest diameter and intensity, choose the one with highest garde. if both fall in the same grade, use FASTRESC from FATEST='Longest Diameter'. 25-50 mm is corresponding to Grade 1, 51-100 mm is corresponding to Grade 2, and >100 mm is corresponding to Grade 3.

Set to 'Rash Occurrence' if source data are from FACE and FAOBJ='Rash', and FATESTCD ne 'SEV' Set to 'Rash' if source data are from FACE and FAOBJ='Solicited Rash', and FATESTCD = 'SEV' Set to 'Lymphadenopathy' if source data are from FACE and FAOBJ='Underarm Gland Swelling or Tenderness' and FATESTCD = 'SEV' Set to 'Lymphadenopathy Occurrence' if source data are from FACE and FAOBJ='Lymphadenopathy' Set to 'Nausea/Vomiting' if source data are from FACE and FAOBJ='Nausea/Vomiting' and FATESTCD = 'SEV' Set to 'Fever' || '(' ||VSSTRESU ||')' if source data are from VS and VSTESTCD in ('TEMP' 'VSALL') Set to FAOBJ ||' Longest Diameter (mm)' if source data are from FACE and FAOBJ in ('Erythema' 'Swelling') and FATEST contains 'Occurrence' and FAORRES='NO' Set to FAOBJ || ' ' || FATEST|| ' ' || '(' ||FAORRESU || ')' if source data are from FACE and FAOBJ in ('Erythema' 'Swelling') and FATEST='Longest Diameter' Set to FAOBJ otherwise. Note: Please add space between the VSTEST and VS unit. If the VSSTRESU is missing, use non-missing VSSTRESU) and assign AVAL=0 (see specs for AVAL)

If source data are from FACE: Set to 'LOCAL' if FASCAT=ADMINISTRATION SITE Set to FASCAT if FASCAT<>ADMINISTRATION SITE
Set to VSSCAT if source data are from VS
Set to 'SYSTEMIC' if PARAMCD='RASH' Set to 'LOCAL' if PARAMCD='LYMPHOCC'
Set to FACE.DOMAIN if source data are from FACE Set to VS.DOMAIN if source data are from VS
Set to FACE.FASEQ if source data are from FACE Set to VS.VSSEQ if source data are from VS
Set to 'FASTRESC' if source data are from FACE Set to 'VSSTRESN' if source data are from VS

1) Use ADAR data, count total number of records with ATOXGRN>0 per subject per vaccination (ATPTREF) where ADAR.PARAMCD is not 'RASH', 'LYMPHOCC' ,''RASHOCC' or AVALC is Y where PARAMCD is 'RASHOCC'. If there are more than one record within same day (ATPTGR1), subject and vaccination (ATPTREF), only count once. 2) Use FAAE/VS data, count total number of records where (FAOBJ is ('Erythema', 'Swelling') and FATEST='Longest Diameter' and FASTRESN>=25 mm) or (FAOBJ is ('Erythema', 'Swelling') and FATEST contains 'Intensity' and FASTRESC contains GRADE 1, GRADE 2 or GRADE 3 or GRADE 4) or (FAAE.FAOBJ='Fever' and FASTRESC contains GRADE 1, GRADE 2, GRADE 3 or GRADE 4) or (for other FAOBJ and FASTRESC is not 'NONE', 'N' or missing) or (VSTESTCD='TEMP' and VSSTRESN>=38.0°C) per subject per vaccination (FATPTREF/VSTPTREF). If there are more than one record within same day (FATPT/VSTPT), subject and vaccination (FATPTREF/VSTPTREF), only count once. 3) sum of 1) and 2) by vaccination

1. Use ADAR data, count total number of records with ATOXGRN>0 per subject per vaccination (ATPTREF) where ADAR.PARAMCD='ARTHRALG'. If there are more than one record within same day (ATPTGR1), subject and vaccination (ATPTREF), only count once. 2. Use FAAE data, count total number of records where FAOBJ='Arthralgia' and FASTRESC is not 'NONE' or missing per subject per vaccination (FATPTREF). If there are more than one record within same day (FATPT), subject and vaccination (FATPTREF), only count once. 3. calculate the sum of the number of records from steps 1 and 2 per subject per vaccination (ATPTREF/FATPTREF) .

Set to ADAR.ATPTREF if data from ADAR If source data are from FAAE, set to ‘Vaccination 1’ if FAAE.FATPTREF contains ‘DOSE 1’, set to ‘Vaccination 2’ if FAAE.FATPTREF contains ‘DOSE 2’. If source data are from VS, ‘Vaccination 1’ if VS.VSTPTREF contains ‘DOSE 1’, ‘Vaccination 2’ if VS.VSTPTREF contains ‘DOSE 2’
Per subject per vaccination (ATPTREF), set to the maximum non-missing AVALC (Y>N) where PARAMCD is 'LYMPHOCC', 'RASHOCC'
Set to AVALC of the record used to derive ATOXGR. Use the highest AVALC if multiple records

1.Use ADAR data, count total number of records with ATOXGRN>0 per subject per vaccination (ATPTREF) where ADAR.PARAMCD='CHILLS'. If there are more than one record within same day (ATPTGR1), subject and vaccination (ATPTREF), only count once. 2. Use FAAE data, count total number of records where FAOBJ='Chills' and FASTRESC is not 'NONE' or missing per subject per vaccination (FATPTREF). If there are more than one record within same day (FATPT), subject and vaccination (FATPTREF), only count once. 3. calculate the sum of the number of records from steps 1 and 2 per subject per vaccination (ATPTREF/FATPTREF) .

Use FAAE data, count total number of records where (FAOBJ='Erythema' and FATEST='Longest Diameter' and FASTRESN>=25 mm) or (FAOBJ='Erythema' and FATEST contains 'Intensity' and FASTRESC contains GRADE 1, GRADE 2 or GRADE 3 or GRADE 4) per subject per vaccination (FATPTREF). If there are more than one record within same day (FATPT), subject and vaccination (FATPTREF), only count once. 3. calculate the sum of the number of records from steps 1 and 2 per subject per vaccination (ATPTREF/FATPTREF) ."

Set to 'LOCAL' if PARAMCD in (LYMPHDUR, PAINDUR, ERYTHDUR, SWELLDUR, WLYMPH, WPAIN, WERYTH, WSWELL, WSLAR) Set to 'SYSTEMIC' if PARAMCD in (HEADADUR, FATIGDUR, MYALGDUR, ARTHRDUR, NAUSEDUR, CHILLDUR, FEVERDUR, RASHDUR, WHEAD, WFATIGUE, WMYALGIA, WARTHR, WNAUSEA, WCHILLS,WFEVER, WSSAR)

Use FAAE data, count total number of records where FAOBJ='Rash' and FASTRESC is not 'N' or missing per subject per vaccination (FATPTREF). If there are more than one record within same day (FATPT), subject and vaccination (FATPTREF), only count once. 3. calculate the sum of the number of records from steps 1 and 2 per subject per vaccination (ATPTREF/FATPTREF) ."
Set to 'ADAR' if PARAMCD does not contain 'DUR'
Set to ADAR.ASEQ based on ATOXGR/AVALC derivation for PARAMCD does not contain 'DUR' and set to the smallest one if multiple records
Set to 'ATOXGR' if PARAM contains 'Worst'; Set to 'AVALC' if PARAMCD is 'RASHOCYN', 'LYMOCCYN'

"1. Use ADAR data, count total number of records with ATOXGRN>0 per subject per vaccination (ATPTREF) where ADAR.PARAMCD='SWELLDIA'. If there are more than one record within same day (ATPTGR1), subject and vaccination (ATPTREF), only count once. 2. Use FAAE data, count total number of records where (FAOBJ='Swelling' and FATEST='Longest Diameter' and FASTRESN>=25 mm) or (FAOBJ='Swelling' and FATEST contains 'Intensity' and FASTRESC contains GRADE 1, GRADE 2 or GRADE 3 or GRADE 4) per subject per vaccination (FATPTREF). If there are more than one record within same day (FATPT), subject and vaccination (FATPTREF), only count once. 3. calculate the sum of the number of records from steps 1 and 2 per subject per vaccination (ATPTREF/FATPTREF) ."

"Use ADAR data, count total number of records with ATOXGRN>0 per subject per vaccination (ATPTREF) where ADAR.PARCAT1 is 'SYSTEMIC' and ADAR.PARAMCD is not 'RASH', 'LYMPHOCC' ,''RASHOCC' or AVALC is Y where PARAMCD is 'RASHOCC'. If there are more than one record within same day (ATPTGR1), subject and vaccination (ATPTREF), only count once. 2) Use FAAE/VS data, count total number of records where (FASCAT='SYSTEMIC' and FASTRESC is not 'NONE', 'N' or missing) or (VSTESTCD='TEMP' and VSSTRESN>=38.0°C) per subject per vaccination (FATPTREF/VSTPTREF). If there are more than one record within same day (FATPT/VSTPT), subject and vaccination (FATPTREF/VSTPTREF), only count once. 3) sum of 1) and 2) by vaccination"

Set to 'D' if only the day is imputed Set to 'M' if the day and the month are imputed
Set to AENDT - TR01SDT + 1 if AENDT >= TR01SDT Set to ASTDT - TR01SDT if AENDT < TR01SDT
"D" if only the day is imputed; "M" if the day and the month are imputed
ASTDT - TR01SDT + 1 if ASTDT >= TR01SDT, else ASTDT - TR01SDT if ASTDT < TR01SDT

Set to 'Y' If CMINDC contians 'Prophylax' AND CMDECOD contains 'PARACETAMOL', 'DIPHENHYDRAMINE HYDROCHLORIDE;PARACETAMOL', 'IBUPROFEN', 'DIPHENHYDRAMINE CITRATE;IBUPROFEN', 'DIPHENHYDRAMINE HYDROCHLORIDE', IBUPROFEN', 'NAPROXEN SODIUM', 'DEXTROMETHORPHAN HYDROBROMIDE' 'GUAIFENESIN', 'PARACETAMOL' 'PSEUDOEPHEDRINE HYDROCHLORIDE', 'DEXTROMETHORPHAN HYDROBROMIDE;DOXYLAMINE SUCCINATE', 'EPHEDRINE SULFATE', 'ETHANOL', 'PARACETAMOL', 'ACETYLSALICYLIC ACID;CAFFEINE', 'PARACETAMOL'
Set to 'Y' if AENDT > TR01EDT + 28 days or AENDT is missing missing otherwise
If (.<TR01SDT<=ASTDT <DOSE2DT) or (.<TR01SDT<=ASTDT and DOSE2DT missing), set to 'Vaccination 1'; if .<DOSE2DT<=ASTDT , set to 'Vaccination 2';
If MDOSREF='Vaccination 1' set to ASTDT – TR01SDT+ 1 If MDOSREF='Vaccination 2' set to ASTDT – DOS2DT+ 1
Set to 'Y' if ASTDT < TR01SDT or ASTDT is missing; missing otherwise
Set to numeric date part of FAOT.FADTC if source data are from FAOT, Set to number date part of ER.ERDTC if source data are from ER, Set to number date part of SS.SSDTC if source data are from SS

Per subject per parameter and per AVISIT, set to ‘Y’ for the worst assessment (AVALC='Y'>'N') within the same visit to be considered first, if there are multiple with same AVALC then set 'Y' to the assessment at scheduled visit (i.e., VISIT doesn't contain "Unshed"). If there are 2 or more scheduled assessments at same visit, set to the last assessment
Set to numeric part of ER.ERDUR
Derive for records where PARAMCD='CONTACT' and AVALC='Y': use ER.ERSTDTC

If PARAMCD='OTHSYMPT' and AVALC='Y', then concatenate all the SUPPFAOT.QVAL where QNAM='SYMPOTH' with ', ' for that subject and visit; If PARAMCD='EXPOTH' and AVALC='Y', then set to SUPPER.QVAL where QNAM='EXPOSEOT'

If PARCAT1='COVID-19 SYMPTOMS' set to FAOT.FAOBJ if PARCAT1='COVID-19 EXPOSURE' set to ER.ERTERM and create PARAM='Duration' if ERDUR is not missing per subject per ERDTC For data from SS, set to SSTEST Per subject per visit, if there are multiple records where PARAM='Other Symptoms', only keep one, and set FASEQ to the earliest FAOT.FASEQ.

Set to FAOT.FACAT if source data are from FAOT Set to ER.ERCAT if source data are from ER For data from SS, set to 'COVID-19 SYMPTOMS' if SSTESTCD='COVIDSYM' and 'COVID-19 EXPOSURE' if SSTESTCD='COVID'
FAOT.DOMAIN if source data are from FAOT; ER.DOMAIN if source data are from ER; SS.DOMAIN if source data are from SS
FAOT.FASEQ if source data are from FAOT; ER.ERSEQ if source data are from ER; SS.SSEQ if source data are from SS

Set to 'FASTRESC' if source data are from FAOT; Set to 'EROCCUR' if source data are from ER if PARAMCD is not 'DUR'; Set to 'ERDUR' if source data are from ER if PARAMCD is 'DUR'; Set to 'SSSTRESC' if source data are from SS
Derive for records where PARAMCD='COVID' and AVALC='Y': use SUPPFAOT.QVAL where QNAM='SYMPTDTC'
Set to 'Y' if EXSTDTC is not missing. Set to 'N' if EXSTDTC is missing and EC.ECOCCUR='N'
EX.DOMAIN if source data are from EX; EC.DOMAIN if source data are from EC
EX.EXSEQ if source data are from EX; EC.ECSEQ if source data are from EC

Set to 'Y' by selecting the latest ADTM or ADT if time is not available with non-missing AVAL/AVALC on or before ADSL.TR01SDTM (TR01SDT if time part of TR01SDTM is missing) for each SUBJID, PARCAT1 and PARAMCD
Set to numeric date part of IS.ISDTC
Concatenate of ADT and ATM if both are available
Same as ANL01FL For PARCAT1='Serum SARS-CoV-2 Neutralizing Antibodies', only consider results from Set 1 LLOQ/ULOQ (MNET 40 and 1280, MN50 91.1 and 2031.87).

If ISSTRESC contains "<" or ISSTRESN<LOD or ISSTRESN<ISLLOQ, then set to LOG10(0.5* times ISLLOQ). If ISSTRESC contains ">" or ISSTRESN>ULOQ then set AVAL as LOG10(ULOQ). Otherwise set to LOG10(IS.ISSTRESN).
If ISSTRESC contains "<" or ISSTRESN<LOD or ISSTRESN<ISLLOQ, then set AVAL as 0.5 times ISLLOQ. If ISSTRESC contains ">" or ISSTRESN>ULOQ then set AVAL as ULOQ. Otherwise set to IS.ISSTRESN.
AVAL where ABLFL = 'Y' for each SUBJID, PARCAT1 and PARAMCD
if CRIT1FL="Y" and PARAMCD is MNET, or MN50, then set to '>=2-fold Increase from Baseline'
'Y' if PARAMCD is MNET or MN50 and post-baseline increase 2 times from the baseline value (R2BASE>=2)
if CRIT2FL="Y" and PARAMCD is MNET, or MN50, then set to '>=3-fold Increase from Baseline'
'Y' if PARAMCD is MNET or MN50 and post-baseline increase 3 times from the baseline value (R2BASE>=3)
if CRIT3FL="Y" and PARAMCD is MNET or MN50, then set to '>=4-fold Increase from Baseline'
'Y' if PARAMCD is MNET or MN50 and post-baseline increase 4 times from the baseline value (R2BASE>=4)
if CRIT4FL="Y" and PARAMCD is MNET, or MN50, then set to 'Seroconversion'

If PARAMCD is MNET or MN50, Derive when both baseline result (ISSTRESC where ABLF='Y') and post-baseline result (AVAL) are non-missing, set to 'Y' if baseline result ISSTRESC contains "<" or ISSTRESN<LOD or ISSTRESN<ISLLOQ and post-baseline >= LLOQ (AVAL>=ISLLOQ); or baseline result does not contain '<' and not less than LOD and not less than ISLLOQ and post-baseline increase 4 times from the baseline value (R2BASE>=4)
Set to 'DERIVED' if PARAMCD contains 'L10' or 'LV58'
Set to 'DERIVED' if PARAMCD contains 'L10' or 'LV58'

"Set to PP_list.PBABREAS for PARCAT1='Serum SARS-CoV-2 Binding Antibodies' based on subject and visit (ADIS.AVISIT and pp_list.VISITTPT). if subject has dosing error (ADSL.PPBABERS contains 'Dosing error') then set to 'Dosing error' and concatenate with the reason from PP_list if applicable"
Set to 'Y' if PP_listing.PVSBABFL='Y' for PARCAT1='Serum SARS-CoV-2 Binding Antibodies' based on subject and visit (ADIS.AVISIT and pp_listing.VISITTPT).
Set to 'Y' if ADSL.PPNAB2FL='Y' and PP_list2.PVSNABFL='Y' for PARCAT1='Serum SARS-CoV-2 Neutralizing Antibodies' based on subject and visit (ADIS.AVISIT and pp_list2.VISITTPT).

Set to PP_list.PNABREAS for PARCAT1='Serum SARS-CoV-2 Neutralizing Antibodies' based on subject and visit (ADIS.AVISIT and pp_list.VISITTPT). if subject has dosing error (ADSL.PPNABERS contains 'Dosing error') then set to 'Dosing error' and concatenate with the reason from PP_list if applicable
Set to 'Y' if PP_listing.PVSNABFL='Y' for PARCAT1='Serum SARS-CoV-2 Neutralizing Antibodies' based on subject and visit (ADIS.AVISIT and pp_listing.VISITTPT).
AVAL/BASE if both are available and BASE is not 0

Set to 'Y' by selecting the latest ADTM or ADT if time is not available with non-missing AVAL/ LBSTRESC on or before TR01SDTM (TR01SDT if time part of TR01SDTM is missing) for each SUBJID, PARCAT1 and PARAMCD. Note: If still multiple, selecting the records with the latest sequence number
Set to numeric date part of LB.LBDTC
Set to numeric date time of LBDTC if time part is not missing

Per subject per parameter, set to Y for the worst post-baseline toxicity grade (ATOXGRL) during vaccination stage (ASTAGEN=1) where ATOXDSCL is not missing using the following order: Grade 4> Grade 3>Grade 2>Grade 1>Grade 0. If there are more than one worst toxicity grades, then set to the first record.

Per subject per parameter, set to Y for the worst post-baseline toxicity grade (ATOXGRH) during vaccination stage (ASTAGEN=1) where ATOXDSCH is not missing using the following order: Grade 4> Grade 3>Grade 2>Grade 1>Grade 0. If there are more than one worst toxicity grades, then set to the first record.

For subjects who received 2 injections (DOSE1FL=’Y’ and DOSE2FL=’Y’), set to ‘Vaccination stage’ If .< ADSL.TR01SDTM <=ADTM and ADT<=earliest date of (date of Visit 7 (i.e. SV.SVSTDTC where SV.VISIT = 'Visit 7 Day 57'), ADSL.EOSDT, ADSL.DTHDT) ; set to 'Follow up stage' if ADT > non-missing date of Visit 7. If date of Visit 7, ADSL.EOSDT, and ADSL.DTHDT are all unavailable, set to ‘Vaccination stage’ for post baseline records. Else leave missing.
For subjects who received only injection (DOSE1FL=’Y’ and DOSE2FL ne ’Y’), set to ‘Vaccination stage’ If .< ADSL.TR01SDTM <=ADTM and ADT<=earliest date of (date of Visit 4 (i.e. SV.SVSTDTC where SV.VISIT = 'Visit 4 Day 29'), ADSL.EOSDT, ADSL.DTHDT) ; set to 'Follow up stage' if ADT > non-missing date of Visit 4. If date of Visit 4, ADSL.EOSDT, and ADSL.DTHDT are all unavailable, set to ‘Vaccination stage’ for post baseline records. Else leave missing.

Set to 'Blood Urea Nitrogen Increased' if PARAMCD='UREAN' Set to 'Creatinine Increased' if PARAMCD='CREAT' Set to 'Alkaline Phosphatase Increased' if PARAMCD='ALP' Set to 'Alanine Aminotransferase Increased' if PARAMCD='ALT' Set to 'Aspartate Aminotransferase Increased' if PARAMCD='AST' Set to 'Bilirubin Increased' if PARAMCD='BILI' Set to 'WBC Increased' if PARAMCD='WBC' Set to 'Eosinophils Increased' if PARAMCD='EOS' Set to 'Prothrombin Time Increased' if PARAMCD='PT' Set to 'Activated Partial Thromboplastin Time Increased' if PARAMCD='APTT'

Set to 'Hemoglobin Decreased' if PARAMCD='HGB' Set to 'Lymphocytes Decreased' if PARAMCD='LYM' Set to 'Neutrophils Decreased' if PARAMCD='NEUT' Set to 'Platelets Decreased' if PARAMCD='PLAT' Set to 'WBC Decreased' if PARAMCD='WBC'

If AVAL is not missing, then assign AVAL toxicity grading as follows: Set to 'Grade 1' if 1.1 – 2.0 × ULN Set to 'Grade 2' if >2.0 – 3.0 × ULN Set to 'Grade 3' if >3.0 – 10 × ULN Set to 'Grade 4' if > 10 × ULN Otherwise, set to 'Grade 0' (ULN = upper limit of normal)

If AVAL is not missing, then assign AVAL toxicity grading as follows: Set to 'Grade 1' if 1.1 – 2.5 x ULN Set to 'Grade 2' if >2.5 – 5.0 × ULN Set to 'Grade 3' if >5.0 – 10 × ULN Set to 'Grade 4' if > 10 × ULN Otherwise, set to 'Grade 0' (ULN = upper limit of normal)

If AVAL is not missing, then assign AVAL toxicity grading as follows: Set to 'Grade 1' if >1.0 – 1.2 × ULN Set to 'Grade 2' if >1.20 – 1.4 × ULN Set to 'Grade 3' if >1.40 – 1.5 × ULN Set to 'Grade 4' if > 1.5 × ULN Otherwise, set to Set to 'Grade 0' (ULN = upper limit of normal)

If AVAL is not missing, then assign AVAL toxicity grading as follows: Set to 'Grade 1' if 1.1 – 2.5 x ULN Set to 'Grade 2' if >2.5 – 5.0 × ULN Set to 'Grade 3' if >5.0 – 10 × ULN Set to 'Grade 4' if > 10 × ULN Otherwise, set to 'Grade 0' (ULN = upper limit of normal)

If AVAL is not missing and (ATOXGRHN>1 where PARAMCD=ALT or ATOXGRHN>1 where PARAMCD=AST), then assign AVAL toxicity grading as follows: Set to 'Grade 1' if 1.1 – 1.25 × ULN Set to 'Grade 2' if >1.25 – 1.5 × ULN Set to 'Grade 3' if >1.5 – 1.75 × ULN Set to 'Grade 4' if > 1.75 × ULN Otherwise, set to Grade '0' (ULN = upper limit of normal)
If AVAL is not missing and (ATOXGRHN=0 where PARAMCD=ALT and ATOXGRHN=0 where PARAMCD=AST), then assign AVAL toxicity grading as follows: Set to 'Grade 1' if 1.1 – 1.5 × ULN Set to 'Grade 2' if >1.5 – 2.0 × ULN Set to 'Grade 3' if >2.0 – 3.0 × ULN Set to 'Grade 4' if > 3.0 × ULN Otherwise, set to Grade '0' (ULN = upper limit of normal)

If AVAL is not missing, then assign toxicity grading based on numeric version of LBORRES (mg/dL) as follows: Set to 'Grade 1' if 1.5-1.7 Set to 'Grade 2' if >1.7 -2.0 Set to 'Grade 3' if >2.0 -2.5 Set to 'Grade 4' if > 2.5 or requires dialysis Otherwise, set to Set to 'Grade 0'

If AVAL is not missing, convert AVAL to cell/mm3 (AVAL*1000), then assign AVAL toxicity grading as follows: Set to 'Grade 1' if 650 – 1,500 Set to 'Grade 2' if 1,501 – 5,000 Set to 'Grade 3' if > 5,000 Set to 'Grade 4' if pending Hypereosinophilic (Per medical review) Otherwise, set to 'Grade 0'

If AVAL is not missing, then assign AVAL toxicity grading as follows: Set to 'Grade 1' if >1.0 – 1.10 × ULN (LB.LBSTNRHI) Set to 'Grade 2' if >1.10 – 1.20 × ULN Set to 'Grade 3' if >1.20 – 1.25 × ULN Set to 'Grade 4' if > 1.25 × ULN Otherwise, set to 'Grade 0' (ULN = upper limit of normal)

If AVAL is not missing, then assign toxicity grading based on numeric version of LBORRES (mg/dL) as follows: Set to 'Grade 1' if 23-26 Set to 'Grade 2' if >26 -31 Set to 'Grade 3' if >31 Set to 'Grade 4' if requires dialysis pending Otherwise, set to Grade '0'

If AVAL is not missing, convert AVAL to cell/mm3 (AVAL*1000),, then assign AVAL toxicity grading as follows: Set to 'Grade 1' if 10,800 – 15,000 Set to 'Grade 2' if 1,5001 – 20,000 Set to 'Grade 3' if 20,001 – 25,000 Set to 'Grade 4' if > 25,000 Otherwise, set to 'Grade 0'

If AVAL is not missing and SEX=’F’, convert AVAL and CHG to g/dl (AVAL*0.1, CHG*0.1), then assign AVAL toxicity grading as follows: Set to 'Grade 1' if 11.0 – 12.0 Set to 'Grade 2' if 9.5 – 10.9 Set to 'Grade 3' if 8.0 – 9.4 Set to 'Grade 4' if < 8.0 Otherwise, set to Grade 0. assign CHG toxicity grading as follows: Set to 'Grade 1' if -1.5 to <0 Set to 'Grade 2' if -2 to -1.6 Set to 'Grade 3' if -5 to -2.1 Set to 'Grade 4' if < -5 Otherwise, set to 'Grade 0' Choose the higher grade between the two.
If AVAL is not missing and SEX=’M’, convert AVAL and CHG to g/dl (AVAL*0.1, CHG*0.1), then assign AVAL toxicity grading as follows: Set to 'Grade 1' if 12.5 – 13.5 Set to 'Grade 2' if 10.5 – 12.4 Set to 'Grade 3' if 8.5 – 10.4 Set to 'Grade 4' if < 8.5 Otherwise, set to 'Grade 0' assign CHG toxicity grading as follows: Set to 'Grade 1' if -1.5 to <0 Set to 'Grade 2' if -2 to -1.6 Set to 'Grade 3' if -5 to -2.1 Set to 'Grade 4' if < -5 Otherwise, set to 'Grade 0' Choose the higher grade between the two.

If AVAL is not missing, convert AVAL to cell/mm3 (AVAL*1000), then assign AVAL toxicity grading as follows: Set to 'Grade 1' if 750 – 1,000 Set to 'Grade 2' if 500 – 749 Set to 'Grade 3' if 250 – 499 Set to 'Grade 4' if < 250 Otherwise, set to Grade '0'

If AVAL is not missing, convert AVAL to cell/mm3 (AVAL*1000), then assign AVAL toxicity grading as follows: Set to 'Grade 1' if 1,500 – 2,000 Set to 'Grade 2' if 1,000 – 1,499 Set to 'Grade 3' if 500 – 999 Set to 'Grade 4' if < 500 Otherwise, set to 'Grade 0'

If AVAL is not missing, convert AVAL to cell/mm3 (AVAL*1000), then assign AVAL toxicity grading as follows: Set to 'Grade 1' if 125,000 – 140,000 Set to 'Grade 2' if 100,000 – 124,000 Set to 'Grade 3' if 25,000 – 99,000 Set to 'Grade 4' if < 25,000 Otherwise, set to 'Grade 0'

If AVAL is not missing, convert AVAL to cell/mm3 (AVAL*1000), then assign AVAL toxicity grading as follows: Set to 'Grade 1' if 2,500 – 3,500 Set to 'Grade 2' if 1,500 – 2,499 Set to 'Grade 3' if 1,000 – 1,499 Set to 'Grade 4' if < 1,000 Otherwise, set to 'Grade 0'

LB.LBSTRESN If LBSTRESC contains '<', then take the value after '<', times 0.5 for AVAL. For example, if LBSTRESC="<3.4", then AVAL=1.7 If LBSTRESC contains '>', then take the value after '>' for AVAL. For example, if LBSTRESC=">75", then AVAL=75

If ABLFL='Y', then AVISIT = 'Baseline', If ADY>1 and VISIT doesn't contain 'Unsched', set to 'Day xx' part of VISIT, if ADY>1 and VISIT contains 'Unsched', set AVISIT as follows: using the visit window below: If VISIT with 1<ADY<=43, then AVISIT = 'Day 29', Else If VISIT with 44<=ADY, then AVISIT = 'Day 57'
Set to AVAL where ABLFL = 'Y' by USUBJID, PARCAT1, and PARAMCD
Set up ANRIND where ABLFL = 'Y' by USUBJID, PARCAT1, and PARAMCD
Merge value of nonmissing ATOXGRH where ABLFL = 'Y' by USUBJID, PARCAT1, and PARAMCD
Merge value of nonmissing ATOXGRL where ABLFL = 'Y' by USUBJID, PARCAT1, and PARAMCD
AVAL-BASE for post-baseline records Note: post-baseline records are defined as any result where (ADTM > ADSL.TR01SDTM if time is available or ADY > 1 otherwise.
Set to 'HALFLLOQ' if LBSTRESC contains '<', Set to 'ULOQ' if LBSTRESC contains '>' Set to missing, otherwise
ADT – ADSL.TR01SDT+ 1 If MDOSREF='Vaccination 1', ADT – ADSL.DOSE2DT+ 1 If MDOSREF='Vaccination 2'.

If LBCAT=CHEMISTRY and LBTESTCD=HCG and LBMETHOD='ELECTROCHEMILUMINESCENCE' or 'CHEMILUMINESCENCE', set to LBMETHOD||' '||LB.LBTEST|| ' (' || LB.LBSTRESU || ')' (please add space between LBMETHOD and LBTEST.) If LBCAT=URINALYSIS set to Urinary || LB.LBTEST|| ' (' || LB.LBSTRESU || ')' if LBSTRESU is not blank If LBCAT ne URINALYSIS set to LB.LBTEST || ' (' || LB.LBSTRESU || ')' if LBSTRESU is not blank If LBSTRESU is blank, set to LB.LBTEST appended with LBSTRESU from non-missing records in parenthesis. Note: Please add space between parameter and unit.
(CHG/BASE)*100 if both are available and BASE is not 0

Only populate for post-baseline records If both of BTOXGRL and ATOXGRL are not missing, set to BTOXGRL|| ' to '||ATOXGRL If either BTOXGRL or ATOXGRL is missing, set the missing BTOXGRL and ATOXGRL to 'UNK', then set to BTOXGRL|| ' to '||ATOXGRL Note: post-baseline records are defined as any result where (ADTM > ADSL.TR01SDTM if time is available or ADY > 1 otherwise.

Only populate for post-baseline records If both of BTOXGRH and ATOXGRH are not missing, set to BTOXGRH|| ' to '||ATOXGRH If either BTOXGRH or ATOXGRH is missing, set the missing BTOXGRH and ATOXGRH to 'UNK', then set to BTOXGRH|| ' to '||ATOXGRH Note: post-baseline records are defined as any result where (ADTM > ADSL.TR01SDTM if time is available or ADY > 1 otherwise.

Set to 'Y' for selecting the latest ADTM or ADT if time is not available with non-missing AVALC on or before ADSL.TR01SDTM (TR01SDT if time part of TR01SDTM is missing) for each SUBJID, PARCAT1 and PARAMCD. Note: ABLFL apply for non-local (LOCALFL is not 'Y') only

Set up AVALC where ABLFL = 'Y' for each SUBJID, PARCAT1 and PARAMCD
Based on SUPPDM.QVALwhere QNAM='COHORT': Set to '>=18 and <55 Years' if contains 'COHORT 1' Set to '>=55 Years' if COHORT contains 'COHORT 2'

Set to RP.RPORRES where RPTESTCD is CHILDPOT and VISIT=Screening

Set to "Y" if USUBJID exists in DS where DSCAT ="DISPOSITION EVENT" and DS.DSSCAT ="END OF STUDY" and DSDECOD = "COMPLETED"; Set to "N" if USUBJID exists in DS where DSCAT = "DISPOSITION EVENT" and DS.DSSCAT = "END OF STUDY" and DSDECOD^= "COMPLETED".

Based on MB.MBSTRESC where MBTESTCD='SARSCOV2' and SUPPMB.QVAL is not 'Y' where QNAM is 'LOCALFL' and (MBDTC is before the first vaccination (DM.RFXSTDTC) or on the first vaccination date if time is not available: set to 'Not Detected' if 'NOTDETECTED' and 'Detected' if 'DETECTED'

"Set to 'Y' if there is one record in MB where MB.MBSTRESC is 'DETECTED' or 'POSITIVE' and MBTESTCD='SARSCOV2' or there is record in AE where AEDECOD is 'COVID-19', 'Asymptomatic COVID-19' or 'SARS-CoV-2 test positive'; Otherwise set to 'N' "
Set to 'Y' if DOSE2DT-TR01SDT+1>36; Otherwise set to 'N'

Mixed case of DS.DSTERM where DSCAT='DISPOSITION EVENT' and DSSCAT='END OF STUDY' AND DSDECOD not in ('COMPLETED', 'AE COVID', 'ADVERSE EVENT (OTHER)', 'PHYSICIAN DESICION', 'WITHDRAWAL BY SUBJECT (OTHER)', 'WITHDRAWAL BY SUBJECT (COVID-19 NON-INFECTION RELATED)', 'PROTOCOL DEVIATION', 'OTHER'). Set to 'Adverse Event (COVID-19 Infection)' if DS.DSDECOD is 'AE COVID' Set to 'Adverse Event (Other)' if DS.DSDECOD is 'ADVERSE EVENT (OTHER)' Set to 'Physician Decision' if DS.DSDECOD is 'PHYSICIAN DESICION' Set to 'Withdrawal of Consent (Other)' if DS.DSDECOD is 'WITHDRAWAL BY SUBJECT (OTHER)' Set to 'Withdrawal of Consent (COVID-19 Non-Infection Related)' if DS.DSDECOD is 'WITHDRAWAL BY SUBJECT (COVID-19 NON-INFECTION RELATED)' Set to 'Protocol Deviation' if DS.DSDECOD is 'PROTOCOL DEVIATION' Set to 'Other' if DS.DSDECOD is 'OTHER'

DS.DSTERM where DSCAT='DISPOSITION EVENT' and DSSCAT='END OF STUDY' AND DSDECOD in ('ADVERSE EVENT (OTHER)', 'PHYSICIAN DESICION', 'WITHDRAWAL BY SUBJECT (OTHER)', 'WITHDRAWAL BY SUBJECT (COVID-19 NON-INFECTION RELATED)', 'PROTOCOL DEVIATION', 'OTHER')

Mixed case of DS.DSTERM where DSCAT='DISPOSITION EVENT' and DSSCAT='STUDY TREATMENT' AND DSDECOD not in ('COMPLETED', 'AE COVID', 'ADVERSE EVENT (OTHER)', 'PHYSICIAN DESICION', 'WITHDRAWAL BY SUBJECT (OTHER)', 'WITHDRAWAL BY SUBJECT (COVID-19 NON-INFECTION RELATED)', 'PROTOCOL DEVIATION', 'OTHER'): Set to 'Adverse Event (COVID-19 Infection)' if DS.DSDECOD is 'AE COVID' Set to 'Adverse Event (Other)' if DS.DSDECOD is 'ADVERSE EVENT (OTHER)' Set to 'Physician Decision' if DS.DSDECOD is 'PHYSICIAN DESICION' Set to 'Withdrawal of Consent (Other)' if DS.DSDECOD is 'WITHDRAWAL BY SUBJECT (OTHER)' Set to 'Withdrawal of Consent (COVID-19 Non-Infection Related)' if DS.DSDECOD is 'WITHDRAWAL BY SUBJECT (COVID-19 NON-INFECTION RELATED)' Set to 'Protocol Deviation' if DS.DSDECOD is 'PROTOCOL DEVIATION' Set to 'Other' if DS.DSDECOD is 'OTHER'

DS.DSTERM where DSCAT='DISPOSITION EVENT' and DSSCAT='STUDY TREATMENT' AND DSDECOD in ('ADVERSE EVENT (OTHER)', 'PHYSICIAN DESICION', 'WITHDRAWAL BY SUBJECT (OTHER)', 'WITHDRAWAL BY SUBJECT (COVID-19 NON-INFECTION RELATED)', 'PROTOCOL DEVIATION', 'OTHER')
Set to 'Y' if USUBJID exists in EX with non-missing EXSTDTC where EX.VISIT contains 'Day 1'; Set to 'N' otherwise
Set to 'Y' if USUBJID exists in EX with non-missing EXSTDTC where EX.VISIT contains 'Day 29'; Set to 'N' otherwise
Set to 'Y' if subject received any dose (based on EX.EXTRT, EX.EXDOSE or EX.EXDOSTXT) which is different from the randomized arm (ARM); 'N' otherwise
Set to DM.DTHDTC and convert to numeric

Based on PP_LISTING, If a subject is excluded from subject-level PP set for nAb and has one record with PNABDVFL='Y', then set to 'Y'. set to 'N' otherwise.

Set to 'Y' if 1. SAFFL='Y; and 2. Have at least one non-missing IS.ISSTRESC with ISCAT contains 'Serum SARS-CoV-2 Binding Antibodies' before the first vaccination (DM.RFSTDTC), and 3. Have at least one non-missing IS.ISSTRESC with ISCAT contains 'Serum SARS-CoV-2 Binding Antibodies' post the first vaccination

Only for subjects with RANDFL='Y'. If SAFFL='N', set to 'Did not receive any study vaccination'; If SAFFL='Y' and FASBABFL='N', set to 'There were no immunogenicity results at baseline and at least one post-vaccination.'. blank otherwise.

Y' if 1. SAFFL='Y; and 2. Have at least one non-missing IS.ISSTRESC with ISCAT contains 'Serum SARS-CoV-2 Neutralizing Antibodies' on or before the date of the first vaccination (TR01SDT), and 3. Have at least one non-missing IS.ISSTRESC with ISCAT contains 'Serum SARS-CoV-2 Neutralizing Antibodies' post the date of first vaccination. 'N' otherwise.

Set to 'Y' if 1. SAFFL='Y; and 2. Have at least one non-missing IS.ISSTRESC with ISCAT contains 'Serum SARS-CoV-2 Neutralizing Antibodies' before the first vaccination (DM.RFSTDTC), and 3. Have at least one non-missing IS.ISSTRESC with ISCAT contains 'Serum SARS-CoV-2 Neutralizing Antibodies' post the first vaccination

Only for subjects with RANDFL='Y'. If SAFFL='N', set to 'Did not receive any study vaccination'; If SAFFL='Y' and FASNABFL='N', set to 'There were no immunogenicity results at baseline and at least one post-vaccination.' blank otherwise
The last non-missing VS.VSSTRESN where VSTESTCD = “HEIGHT” and (VSDTC is before the first vaccination (DM.RFXSTDTC) or on the first vaccination date with VSTPT contains 'PRE-DOSE'.)

Only for subjects with RANDFL='Y' and PN2D29FL='N': Set to PP_list2.PNABREAS where VISITTPT='Day 29'. if subejct has dosing error (ADSL.PPNAB2ER contains 'Dosing error') then set to 'Dosing error' and concatenate with the reason from PP_list2 if applicable

set PP_LIST2.PVSNABFL where VISITTPT='Day 29'; set to 'N' if subject's actual doses is outside + 25 ug (25 ug inclusive) / -25 ug (-25 ug exclusive) range from the planned vaccine dose (refer to PPBABFL)

set PP_LIST2.PVSNABFL where VISITTPT='Day 57'; set to 'N' if subject's actual doses is outside + 25 ug (25 ug inclusive) / -25 ug (-25 ug exclusive) range from the planned vaccine dose (refer to PPBABFL)

"Only for subjects with RANDFL='Y' and PPBABFL='N': if subject is excluded due to dosing error as defined in PPBABFL then set to 'Dosing error' and concatenate the reasons from PP_list if the subject is also excluded due to other reasons. For exclusion based on PP_list, set to PP_list.PBABREAS and concatenate all unique reasons (Note: merge data by USUBJID)"

"Subjects in FAS for bAb and 1. Complied with the injection schedule as defined in the protocol visit window, 2. don’t have COVID-19 infection at baseline, 3. don't have deviation impact bAb responses. 4. both actual doses are within + 25 ug (25 ug inclusive) / -25 ug (-25 ug exclusive) range from the planned vaccine dose set to 'Y' if 1) for #1-3, based on PP_LIST, If a subject has one record with PVSBABFL='Y', and 2) for #4, a) both TRT01P and TRT01A are 'Placebo'; or b) both TRT01P and TRT01A are 'mRNA-1273 50 ug' and there is no record in EX where EXTRT is 'Placebo' or (EXTRT is 'mRNA-1273' and EXDOSTXT contains '>0-25', '>75-<100' or '>100-125', or '>125 or above'); or c) both TRT01P and TRT01A are 'mRNA-1273 100 ug' and there is no record in EX where EXTRT is 'Placebo' or (EXTRT is 'mRNA-1273' and EXDOSTXT contains '>0-25', '>25-<50' or >50-75', '>125 or above'); 'N' otherwise."

set PP_LIST.PVSBABFL where VISITTPT='Day 29'; set to 'N' if subject's actual doses is outside + 25 ug (25 ug inclusive) / -25 ug (-25 ug exclusive) range from the planned vaccine dose (refer tp PPBABFL).

Only for subjects with RANDFL='Y' and PPBD57FL='N': Set to PP_list.PBABREAS where VISITTPT='Day 57'. if subejct has dosing error (ADSL.PPBABERS contains 'Dosing error') then set to 'Dosing error' and concatenate with the reason from PP_list if applicable

set PP_LIST.PVSBABFL where VISITTPT='Day 57'; set to 'N' if subject's actual doses is outside + 25 ug (25 ug inclusive) / -25 ug (-25 ug exclusive) range from the planned vaccine dose (refer tp PPBABFL)

Only for subjects with RANDFL='Y' and PPNAB2FL='N'. if subject is excluded due to dosing error as defined in PPNABFL then set to 'Dosing error' and concatenate the reasons from PP_list2 if the subject is also excluded due to other reasons. For exclusion based on PP_list2, set to PP_list2.PNABREAS and concatenate all unique reasons (Note: merge data by USUBJID)

Subjects with FAS for nAb and 1. Complied with the injection schedule as defined in the protocol visit window, 2. don’t have COVID-19 infection at baseline, 3. don't have deviation impact nAb responses. 4. both actual doses are within + 25 ug (25 ug inclusive) / -25 ug (-25 ug exclusive) range from the planned vaccine dose. set to 'Y' if 1) for #1-3, based on PP_LIST2, If a subject has one record with PVSNABFL='Y', and 2) for #4, a) both TRT01P and TRT01A are 'Placebo'; or b) both TRT01P and TRT01A are 'mRNA-1273 50 ug' and there is no record in EX where EXTRT is 'Placebo' or (EXTRT is 'mRNA-1273' and EXDOSTXT contains '>0-25', '>75-<100' or '>100-125', or '>125'); or c) both TRT01P and TRT01A are 'mRNA-1273 100 ug' and there is no record in EX where EXTRT is 'Placebo' or (EXTRT is 'mRNA-1273' and EXDOSTXT contains '>0-25', '>25-<50 ug' or >50-75', '>125'); 'N' otherwise.

For exclusion based on PP_list, set to PP_list.PNABREAS and concatenate all unique reasons (Note: merge data by USUBJID)"

"Subjects with FAS for nAb and 1. Complied with the injection schedule as defined in the protocol visit window, 2. don’t have COVID-19 infection at baseline, 3. don't have deviation impact nAb responses. 4. both actual doses are within + 25 ug (25 ug inclusive) / -25 ug (-25 ug exclusive) range from the planned vaccine dose. set to 'Y' if 1) for #1-3, based on PP_LIST, If a subject has one record with PVSNABFL='Y', and 2) for #4, a) both TRT01P and TRT01A are 'Placebo'; or b) both TRT01P and TRT01A are 'mRNA-1273 50 ug' and there is no record in EX where EXTRT is 'Placebo' or (EXTRT is 'mRNA-1273' and EXDOSTXT contains '>0-25', '>75-<100' or '>100-125', or '>125'); or c) both TRT01P and TRT01A are 'mRNA-1273 100 ug' and there is no record in EX where EXTRT is 'Placebo' or (EXTRT is 'mRNA-1273' and EXDOSTXT contains '>0-25', '>25-<50 ug' or >50-75', '>125'); 'N' otherwise."

Only for subjects with RANDFL='Y' and PPND29FL='N': Set to PP_list.PNABREAS where VISITTPT='Day 29'. if subejct has dosing error (ADSL.PPNABERS contains 'Dosing error') then set to 'Dosing error' and concatenate with the reason from PP_list if applicable

set PP_LIST.PVSNABFL where VISITTPT='Day 29'; set to 'N' if subject's actual doses is outside + 25 ug (25 ug inclusive) / -25 ug (-25 ug exclusive) range from the planned vaccine dose (refer to PPBABFL)

Only for subjects with RANDFL='Y' and PPND57FL='N': Set to PP_list.PNABREAS where VISITTPT='Day 57'. if subejct has dosing error (ADSL.PPNABERS contains 'Dosing error') then set to 'Dosing error' and concatenate with the reason from PP_list if applicable

set PP_LIST.PVSNABFL where VISITTPT='Day 57'; set to 'N' if subject's actual doses is outside + 25 ug (25 ug inclusive) / -25 ug (-25 ug exclusive) range from the planned vaccine dose (refer to PPBABFL)
Set to SUPPDM.QVAL where QNAM='PREVSCR' per USUBJID
Set to SUPPDM.QVAL where QNAM is PROTVER
If RACE='OTHER' then set to SUPPDM.QVAL where QNAM is RACEOTH; If RACE='MULTIPLE' then set to SUPPDM.QVAL where QNAM is MULRACE
DS.DSSTDTC where DSTERM='RANDOMIZED' and DSCAT='PROTOCOL MILESTONE'
Set to 'Y' if USUBJID exists in DS where DSDECOD='RANDOMIZED' and DSSTDTC not missing and DSREFID not missing. Set to 'N' otherwise
Only for subjects with RANDFL='Y'. Set to 'Did not receive any vaccination' if SAFFL='N'. blank otherwise

Only for subjects with RANDFL='Y'. If SAFFL='N', set to 'Did not receive any study vaccination'; If SAFFL='Y' and SAR1FL='N', set to 'Did not contribute any solicited AR data for Vaccination #1'. blank otherwise

Only for subjects with RANDFL='Y'. If SAFFL='N', set to 'Did not receive any study vaccination'; If SAFFL='Y' and DOSE2FL='N', set to 'Did not receive Vaccination #2'. If SAFFL='Y'and DOSE2FL='Y' and SAR2FL='N', set to 'Did not contribute any solicited AR data for Vaccination #2'. blank otherwise
Set to 'Y' if SAR1FL='Y' or SAR2FL='Y'
Set to RP.RPORRES where RPTESTCD is CHILDPOTand VISIT=Screening
Set to SUPPDM.QVAL where QNAM='PREVSCR' per USUBJID
Set to SUPPDM.QVAL where QNAM is PROTVER and VISIT=Screening
If RACE='OTHER' then set to SUPPDM.QVAL where QNAM is RACEOTH If RACE='MULTIPLE' then set to SUPPDM.QVAL where QNAM is MULRACE

Mixed case of DS.DSTERM where DSCAT="DISPOSITION EVENT" and DSSCAT='SCREEN FAILURE' and DS.DSDECOD^='OTHER'. Set to 'Other' if DS.DSDECOD='OTHER' where DSCAT="DISPOSITION EVENT" and DSSCAT='SCREEN FAILURE'.
The last non-missing VS.VSSTRESN where VSTESTCD = 'WEIGHT' and (VSDTC is before the first vaccination (DM.RFXSTDTC) or on the first vaccination date with VSTPT contains 'PRE-DOSE'.)

Set to 'Y' by selecting the latest ADTM or ADT if ATM is missing with non-missing AVAL/AVALC on or before TR01SDTM (TR01SDT if time part of TR01SDTM is missing) for each SUBJID and PARAMCD Note: exclude records where ADT is the same as TR01SDT and VSTPT^='PRE-DOSE'
Set to numeric date part of VS.VSDTC
Set to numeric date time of VSDTC if time part is not missing
Set to 'Y' by selecting the first worst toxicity grade (ATOXGRL Worst Case Order: Grade 4> Grade 3>Grade 2>Grade 1>Grade 0) by Subject, Parameter and Analysis Visit
Set to 'Y' by selecting the first worst toxicity grade (ATOXGRH Worst Case Order: Grade 4> Grade 3>Grade 2>Grade 1>Grade 0) by Subject, Parameter and Analysis Visit

For subjects who received 2 injections (DOSE1FL=’Y’ and DOSE2FL=’Y’), set to ‘Vaccination stage’ If .< ADSL.TR01SDTM <=ADTM and ADT<=earliest date of (date of Visit 7 (i.e. SV.SVSTDTC where SV.VISIT = 'Visit 7 Day 57'), ADSL.EOSDT, ADSL.DTHDT) ; set to 'Follow up stage' if ADT > non-missing date of Visit 7. If date of Visit 7, ADSL.EOSDT, and ADSL.DTHDT are all unavailable, set to ‘Vaccination stage’ for post baseline records. Else leave missing.
For subjects who received only injection (DOSE1FL=’Y’ and DOSE2FL ne ’Y’), set to ‘Vaccination stage’ If .< ADSL.TR01SDTM <=ADTM and ADT<=earliest date of (date of Visit 4 (i.e. SV.SVSTDTC where SV.VISIT = 'Visit 4 Day 29'), ADSL.EOSDT, ADSL.DTHDT) ; set to 'Follow up stage' if ADT > non-missing date of Visit 4. If date of Visit 4, ADSL.EOSDT, and ADSL.DTHDT are all unavailable, set to ‘Vaccination stage’ for post baseline records. Else leave missing.
Time part of VS.VSDTC converted to numeric

Assign AVAL toxicity grading as follows If AVAL is not missing: Set to 'Grade 1' if 91 – 95 Set to 'Grade 2' if 96 – 100 Set to 'Grade 3' if >100 Set to 'Grade 4' is based on medical input: Otherwise, set to 'Grade 0'

Assign AVAL toxicity grading as follows If AVAL is not missing: Set to 'Grade 1' if 101 – 115 Set to 'Grade 2' if 116 – 130 Set to 'Grade 3' if >130 Set to 'Grade 4' is based on medical input: Otherwise, set to 'Grade 0'

Assign AVAL toxicity grading as follows If AVAL is not missing: Set to 'Grade 1' if 17 – 20 Set to 'Grade 2' if 21 – 25 Set to 'Grade 3' if >25 Set to 'Grade 4' is based on medical input: Otherwise, set to 'Grade 0'

Assign AVAL toxicity grading as follows If AVAL is not missing: Set to 'Grade 1' if 141 – 150 Set to 'Grade 2' if 151 – 155 Set to 'Grade 3' if >155 Set to 'Grade 4' is based on medical input: Otherwise, set to 'Grade 0'

Assign AVAL toxicity grading as follows If AVAL is not missing: Set to 'Grade 1' if 38.0 – 38.4 Set to 'Grade 2' if 38.5 – 38.9 Set to 'Grade 3' if 39.0 – 40.0 Set to 'Grade 4' if >40.0 Otherwise, set to 'Grade 0'

Assign AVAL toxicity grading as follows If AVAL is not missing: Set to 'Grade 1' if 50 – 54 Set to 'Grade 2' if 45 – 49 Set to 'Grade 3' if <45 Set to 'Grade 4' is based on medical input: Otherwise, set to 'Grade 0'

Assign AVAL toxicity grading as follows If AVAL is not missing: Set to 'Grade 1' if 85 – 89 Set to 'Grade 2' if 80 – 84 Set to 'Grade 3' if <80 Set to 'Grade 4' is based on medical input: Otherwise, set to Grade '0'
Merge value of nonmissing AVAL where ABLFL = 'Y' by USUBJID and PARAMCD, Set to AVAL where ABLFL = 'Y'.
Merge value of nonmissing ATOXGRH where ABLFL = 'Y' by USUBJID and PARAMCD;
Merge value of nonmissing ATOXGRL where ABLFL = 'Y' by USUBJID and PARAMCD;

For post baseline records only, if AVAL and BASE are both non-missing, set to AVAL - BASE Note: post-baseline records are defined as any result where (ADTM > ADSL.TR01SDTM if time is available, if time is not available use (ADY=1 and VSTPT^='PRE-DOSE') or ADY > 1).
ADT – ADSL.TR01SDT+ 1 If MDOSREF='Vaccination 1', ADT – ADSL.DOSE2DT+ 1 If MDOSREF='Vaccination 2'.
VS.VSTEST ' (' ||VSSTRESU|| ')' if VSSTRESU is non-missing, if VSSTRESU is missing, use the non-missing VSSTRESU from the same VSTEST

Only populate for post-baseline records If both of BTOXGRL and ATOXGRL are not missing, set to BTOXGRL|| ' to '||ATOXGRL If either BTOXGRL or ATOXGRL is missing, set the missing BTOXGRL and ATOXGRL to 'UNK', then set to BTOXGRL|| ' to '||ATOXGRL Note: post-baseline records are defined as any result where (ADTM > ADSL.TR01SDTM if time is available, if time is not available use (ADY=1 and VSTPT^='PRE-DOSE') or ADY > 1).

Only populate for post-baseline records If both of BTOXGRH and ATOXGRH are not missing, set to BTOXGRH|| ' to '||ATOXGRH If either BTOXGRH or ATOXGRH is missing, set the missing BTOXGRH and ATOXGRH to 'UNK', then set to BTOXGRH|| ' to '||ATOXGRH Note: post-baseline records are defined as any result where (ADTM > ADSL.TR01SDTM if time is available, if time is not available use (ADY=1 and VSTPT^='PRE-DOSE') or ADY > 1).
Set to ADT - ADSL.TR01SDT + 1 if If ADT >= ADSL.TR01SDT, or Set to ADT - ADSL.TR01SDT if ADT < ADSL.TR01SDT

Set to 'Y' if ABLFL='Y', For post-baseline assessments where AVISITN is non-missing and result (AVAL) is non-missing, per subject per parameter and per AVISIT, Within an AVISIT, Set to ‘Y’ for the assessment at scheduled visit (i.e., VISIT doesn't contain "Unsched") or Set to ‘Y’ for the latest assessment if there are 2 or more assessments at scheduled visit, or Set to ‘Y’ for the latest assessment if there is no scheduled visit, or Set to 'Y' for the assessment closest to the target study day in the visit window or Set to 'Y' for the latest assessment If there are 2 or more assessments equal distance to the target study day
Non-missing EX.EXSTDTC where EX.VISIT contains 'Day 29' and convert to numeric
Date part of non-missing EX.EXSTDTC where EX.VISIT contains 'Day 29' and convert to numeric
DS.DSSTDTC where DSCAT='DISPOSITION EVENT' and DSSCAT='END OF STUDY' and convert to numeric
Set to 'COMPLETED' if COMPLFL='Y' Set to 'DISCONTINUED' if COMPLFL='N' Else set to 'ONGOING'.
DS.DSSTDTC where DSCAT='DISPOSITION EVENT' and DSSCAT='STUDY TREATMENT' and convert to numeric

Set to 'COMPLETED' if USUBJID exists in DS where DSCAT='DISPOSITION EVENT' and DSSCAT='STUDY TREATMENT' AND DSDECOD='COMPLETED'. Set to 'DISCONTINUED' if USUBJID exists in DS where DSCAT='DISPOSITION EVENT' and DSSCAT='STUDY TREATMENT' AND DSDECOD^='COMPLETED'. Else set to 'ONGOING'.
Set to "Y" if RANDFL="Y" AND USUBJID exists in EX with non-missing EXSTDTC. Set to "N" otherwise
Date part of DM.RFXENDTC and convert to numeric
Date part of DM.RFXSTDTC and convert to numeric
1 if AREL= 'NOT RELATED', 2 if AREL= 'RELATED', 3 If AREL= 'NOT APPLICABLE'
1 if ASEV = 'Grade 1/Mild' 2 if ASEV = 'Grade 2/Moderate' 3 if ASEV = 'Grade 4/Severe' 4 if AESEV='Grade 4'
Sort by USUBJID, PARCAT1, PARAMCD, ATPTREF, ATPTN and start from 1, increase by 1 for records within each subject
1 if ATPT contains 'Day 1', 2 if ATPT=’DAY 2’, 3 if ATPT=’DAY 3’, 4 if ATPT=’DAY 4’, 5 if ATPT=’DAY 5’, 6 if ATPT=’DAY 6’ 7 if ATPT=’DAY 7’

RASH if PARAM=’Rash’, RASHOCC if PARAM=’Rash Occurrence’, LYMPHOCC if PARAM=’Lymphadenopathy Occurrence’, LYMPH if PARAM='Lymphadenopathy', PAIN if PARAM='Pain', ERYTHDIA if PARAM='Erythema Longest Diameter (mm)' SWELLDIA if PARAM='Swelling Longest Diameter (mm)', HEADACHE if PARAM='Headache', FATIGUE if PARAM='Fatigue', MYALGIA if PARAM='Myalgia', ARTHRALG if PARAM='Arthralgia' NAUSEA if PARAM='Nausea/Vomiting', CHILLS if PARAM='Chills', MEDATTEN if PARAM='Receive Medical Attention?' FEVER if PARAM='Fever (C)'
Sort by USUBJID, PARCAT1, PARAMCD, ATPTREF and start from 1, increase by 1 for records within each subject

RASHOCC if PARAM='Rash Occurrence', LYMPH if PARAM='Lymphadenopathy', PAIN if PARAM='Pain', ERYTHDIA if PARAM='Erythema Longest Diameter (mm)' SWELLDIA if PARAM='Swelling Longest Diameter (mm)', HEADACHE if PARAM='Headache', FATIGUE if PARAM='Fatigue', MYALGIA if PARAM='Myalgia', ARTHRALG if PARAM='Arthralgia', NAUSEA if PARAM='Nausea', CHILLS if PARAM='Chills', FEVER if PARAM='Fever (C)'

set to 'LOCAL' if PARAMCD in (LYMPHDUR PAINDUR ERYTHDUR SWELLDUR, WLYMPH, WPAIN, WERYTH, WSWELL, WSLAR) set to 'SYSTEMIC' if PARAMCD in (HEADADUR FATIGDUR MYALGDUR ARTHRDUR NAUSEDUR CHILLDUR FEVERDUR RASHDUR, WHEAD, WFATIGUE, WMYALGIA, WARTHR, WNAUSEA, WCHILLS,WFEVER, WSSAR)

'DUR' if PARAM='Duration', 'EXPFAM' if PARAM='Family member', 'EXPHCF' if PARAM='Health Care Facility', 'EXPOTH' if PARAM='Other exposure', 'EXPSOC' if PARAM='Social setting', 'EXPTRAV' if PARAM='Travel', 'EXPWORK' if PARAM='Work', 'CONTACT' if PARAM='The participant had close contact with a person known to have SARS-CoV-2 infection or COVID-19', 'COUGH' if PARAM='Cough', 'SOB' if PARAM='Shortness of Breath', 'FEVER' if PARAM='Fever', 'SORETHRT' if PARAM='Sore Throat', 'CHESTTP' if PARAM='Chest Tightness/Pressure', 'HEADACHE' if PARAM='Headache', 'LETHARGY' if PARAM='Lethargy', 'MYALGIA' if PARAM='Myalgia', 'ANOSMIA' if PARAM='Anosmia', 'DYSGEUSI' if PARAM='Dysgeusia', 'CHILLS' if PARAM='Chills', 'REPTSHAK' if PARAM='Repeated Shaking with chills', 'OTHSYMPT' if PARAM='Other Symptoms', 'COVID' if PARAM='COVID-19'
Set to ISTESTCD and create follow PARAMCDs if AVAL is not missing; L10PVN50, L10PVN80, L10MN50, LV58IGGS, LV58IGGN, LV58IGMS, LV58IG1S, LV58IG2S, LV58IG3S, LV58IG4S

Set to ECLIAHCG if LBCAT=CHEMISTRY and LBTESTCD=HCG and LBMETHOD=ELECTROCHEMILUMINESCENCE Set to CHEMIHCG if LBCAT=CHEMISTRY and LBTESTCD=HCG and LBMETHOD=CHEMILUMINESCENCE Set to U || LBTESTCD If LBCAT=URINALYSIS Set to LBTESTCD if LBCAT ne URINALYSIS
Based on AGECHRT: Set to 1 if '>=18 and <55 Years' Set to 2 if '>=55 Years'

1 if ATPT='DAY 1', 1.1 If ATPT='DAY 1, 1 HOUR AFTER VACCINATION (AT STUDY CLINIC)' , 1.2 if ATPT='DAY 1, AFTER VACCINATION (AT HOME)', 2 if ATPT='DAY 2', 3 if ATPT='DAY 3', 4 if ATPT='DAY 4', 5 if ATPT='DAY 5', 6 if ATPT='DAY 6', 7 if ATPT='DAY 7'
1 if ASTAGE= Vaccination stage, 2 if ASTAGE= Follow up stage
0 if ATOXGRH=Grade 0, 1 if ATOXGRH=Grade 1, 2 if ATOXGRH=Grade 2, 3 if ATOXGRH=Grade 3, 4 if ATOXGRH=Grade 4
0 if ATOXGRL=Grade 0, 1 if ATOXGRL=Grade 1, 2 if ATOXGRL=Grade 2, 3 if ATOXGRL=Grade 3, 4 if ATOXGRL=Grade 4
0 if ATOXGR=Grade 0, 1 if ATOXGR=Grade 1, 2 if ATOXGR=Grade 2, 3 if ATOXGR=Grade 3, 4 if ATOXGR=Grade 4
1 if AVISIT = 'Baseline', 2 if AVISIT=Day 1, 3 if AVISIT=Day 8, 4 if AVISIT=Day 15, 5 if AVISIT=Day 29, 6 if AVISIT=Day 36, 7 if AVISIT=Day 43, 8 if AVISIT=Day 57

“<=1" for ‘Day 1’ “Day 2 - Day 11” for ‘Day 8’, “Day 12 - Day 22” for “Day 15”, “Day 23 – Day 32” for “Day 29”, “Day 33 – Day 39” for “Day 36”, “Day 40 - Day 50” for “Day 43”, “Day 51 – Day 133” for “Day 57”
2 for ‘Day 1’ 8 for ‘Day 8’, 15 for 'Day 15', 29 for 'Day 29', 36 for 'Day 36', 43 for 'Day 43', 57 for 'Day 57'
Toxicity Grading Scale for Healthy Adult and Adolescent Volunteers Enrolled in Preventive Vaccine Clinical Trials (September 2007)
1 if TRT01A=‘Placebo’, 2 if TRT01A=‘mRNA-1273 50 ug’, 3 if TRT01A=‘mRNA-1273 100 ug’"
1 if TRT01P=‘Placebo’, 2 if TRT01P=‘mRNA-1273 50 ug’, 3 if TRT01P=‘mRNA-1273 100 ug’"
